user_prompt: Collect news articles and recent trends about the prospect of agentic AI in near future and write a marketing post about our company, then post the output to Discord and Slack
content:
Transform the way you work with FlowAI! As businesses increasingly recognize the power of agentic AI, it’s time to elevate your productivity. Imagine reclaiming 2 hours every day—what would you achieve with that extra time?

FlowAI Core is your intelligent automation partner, learning from your unique workflow to handle repetitive tasks effortlessly. With seamless integration across 50+ tools, you can streamline your operations and focus on what truly matters.

Recent advancements in AI, like Amazon's significant investment in computing chips and Robinhood's introduction of AI chatbots, highlight a growing trend—smart technology is revolutionizing the workplace. Now, you can be a part of this exciting shift.

Join the movement towards efficiency and innovation. With FlowAI, work less and flow more—start your journey today for just $29 a month!

#AgenticAI #ArtificialIntelligence #MachineLearning #AIInnovation #TechForGood #FutureOfAI #SmartTechnology #AIRevolution
sources: • [Amazon Strikes $6 Billion Deal With Snowflake for Agentic Computing Chips - WSJ](https://slashdot.org/firehose.pl?op=view&id=183432758)

• [Salesforce crushes Wall Street’s targets in its latest results but can’t boost its struggling stock](https://siliconangle.com/2026/05/27/salesforce-crushes-wall-streets-targets-latest-results-cant-boost-struggling-stock/)
• [Robinhood to let investors use AI chatbots for share trading - Financial Times](https://slashdot.org/firehose.pl?op=view&id=183432578)

• [75% of Americans say they would trust AI shopping recommendations less if results were sponsored](https://spacedaily.com/n-75-of-americans-say-they-would-trust-ai-shopping-recommendations-less-if-results-were-sponsored-which-means-openai-just-made-a-decision-that-could-structurally-damage-the-thing-that-makes-it/)
